name: Smoked Salmon Cheescake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces smoked salmon, finely flaked and skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, combine bread crumbs and melted margarine or butter in a small mixing bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch quiche dish. Set aside.
2. For the filling, beat eggs slightly in a large mixing bowl. Stir in ricotta cheese, Swiss cheese, evaporated skim milk, smoked salmon, dried dillweed, and salt. If making ahead, cover and refrigerate until ready to bake, up to 6 hours.
3. Pour the filling into the prepared quiche dish. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes or until the center is nearly set when shaken.
4. Remove from oven and let cool slightly in the pan or on a wire rack. Serve warm.
5. Cut into wedges. Top with a dollop of sour cream and a sprig of dill if desired.
6. To reheat one slice, place it on a microwave-safe plate. Cover loosely with microwave-safe plastic wrap. Microwave at 50% power for about 40 seconds.
